hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && make check >&2 || jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"make check failed — fix format/lint issues before committing (make ci adds the test suite)."}}' ;; esac
